Flow.description:
03.19.2026 (MJD) - v11 - Refactored to pass created Student Match Criteria Id to Right Fit Match Preview via varStudentMatchCriteriaId; LWC loads criteria from record, no formulas needed. 03.20.2026 (MJD) - v10 - Adding 'Matching Preview' screen/LWC that checks for outputs from student criteria. 12.15.2025 (MJD) - v7/v8 - Removed 'fault' path & error message for this version....can't seem to get around it when submitting values for survey.... 11.06.2025 (MJD) - v6 - First Name on screen not reflected, so switched to pull Contact 'First Name' and 'Last Name' 10.20.2025 (MJD) - v2 - Removed 'Preferred Major' from screen selection criteria. Values not populated in database, so removed for now. v.61 populates the Match Criteria lookup on the contact record.
10.08.2025 (MJD) - v9 - Updated values for screen selections for Student Match Criteria. 09.09.2025 (MJD) - v8 - Added 'Decision' node to see if 'Any/All' selected, then used appropriate 'Create' based on value. 09.09.2025 (MJD) - v7 - Updated 'College Setting' to automatically turn on other values when 'Any/All' selected. Updated SEED Logo on validation screen. 09.09.2025 (MJD) - v6 - Added validation rule on 'College Setting' values for 'Any/All (no preference)' selection. 09.09.2025 (MJD) - v5 - Updated 'College Setting' field to multi-selection option and added 'Any/All (no preference)' as a selection option.
Flow.interviewLabel: Student Right Fit School Selection Criteria {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Automation - Student Match Criteria - Right Fit Student Match Criteria Capture (Screen Flow)

fields.name: student_match_criteria_text
fields.fieldText:
﻿Step 2:

Provide your desired college search criteria so that SEED can help you find the right fit.


Note: You must have at least one selection for region and size to generate search results.

fields.name: College_Region_Text
fields.fieldText: Which region(s) do you want to include in your college search?

fields.name: College_Setting_Preference
fields.fieldText: College Setting Preference (You may select more than one choice)

fields.name: Student_Match_Criteria_Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
You did it!

Congrats on kicking off your college search﻿.


Your college counselor will be in touch with you soon to share which schools are the right fit for you.

fields.name: Verify_Contact_Info
fields.fieldText:
Step 1:

To get your college search started, please provide your name, counselor and grade below.
